improvements.prompt_addition: When creating a new infra module, also verify and wire it into the deployment entrypoint (infra/main.bicep) unless explicitly out of scope.
improvements.rationale: Prevents implementing resources that never deploy from the main template.

improvements.prompt_addition: For alerting tasks, map each acceptance criterion to a specific alert query and ensure failure semantics are modeled correctly (failed executions vs exceptions).
improvements.rationale: Avoids query logic that can produce false positives/negatives against expected behavior.

improvements.prompt_addition: Require tests to validate both module content and deployment wiring (main module invocation, common action group linkage, and evaluation frequency).
improvements.rationale: Improves confidence that infrastructure changes are deployable and consistently configured.
